examples: So be prepared to throw away your ibuprofen and crepe bandages.
With the help of 16 chefs, he prepared a 9.9 meter crepe in under 40 minutes.
Office cubicles are festooned with orange and black crepe paper and bowls of candy.
Wait in line, her version of this grilled chickpea flour crepe is worth it.
At her restaurant, patrons go for the fried crepe flowers or the spicy floral salads.
